summary: Iteration 13: Tested 4 new features - Lender Usage Analytics, Security Address fields, Fact Find Summary tab, and Client Portfolio tab. All features working correctly.

issues: LTV column shows '-' because existing cases don't have ltv field populated
Status column shows '-' for all cases - consider showing actual case status

seed_data_creation: Test clients TEST_SecurityAddr and TEST_CaseModel created during backend testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features working: 1) Lender Analytics tab with 4 ranked tables, 2) Security Address fields in New Case form, 3) Fact Find Summary tab in CaseDetail, 4) Portfolio tab in ClientDetail with expiry warnings. John Smith client has 2 cases - one residential (Halifax, expiring 2026-08-15 with warning icon) and one BTL (NatWest, expiring 2028-12-01). LTV values are not set on existing cases so Average LTV shows 0%.

1_lender_analytics_tab.details: Found data-testid='lender-analytics-tab'. All 4 sections render: All Time, Last 12 Months, Buy To Let, Residential

2_backend_lender_usage_api.details: GET /api/analytics/lender-usage returns all_time, last_12_months, buy_to_let, residential arrays with correct structure

3_new_case_form_security_fields.details: Security Property Address and Security Post Code fields present. Rate Fixed For field removed.

4_backend_security_address.details: POST /api/cases accepts and returns security_address and security_postcode fields

5_fact_find_tab.details: Found data-testid='tab-factfind'. Shows Client Details, Employment, Mortgage Details, Security Address sections

6_case_edit_mode.details: Security Property Address and Security Post Code fields present. Fixed Rate Period removed, Initial Product Term field shown

7_portfolio_tab.details: Found data-testid='tab-portfolio'. Shows 6 summary metrics (Total Properties, Total Loan Amount, etc.)

8_portfolio_table.details: Table shows Property Address, Type, Lender, Loan Amount, Property Value, Rate, LTV, Term, Product Term, Expiry, Status, Actions columns

9_portfolio_view_action.details: Found 2 View action buttons for the 2 mortgage cases

10_expiry_warning.details: Halifax case (expiring 2026-08-15) shows amber warning icon. NatWest case (expiring 2028-12-01) does not.
